# Generator Hub

Compact tool hub for TikTok comments, math sequences, and ETL sequence guidance.

Canonical: https://generators.317713.xyz/
Sitemap: https://generators.317713.xyz/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://generators.317713.xyz/robots.txt

## What it does

- Routes users to three live tools and a small set of static guides.
- Generates grouped TikTok comments from caption, keywords, language, goals, and tone.
- Generates arithmetic, geometric, Fibonacci, random, and formula-based number sequences in the browser.
- Generates random Bible verses from the KJV translation, filtered by Old/New Testament and topics like Comfort, Wisdom, and Faith.
- Explains sequence generator meaning across math, Informatica, IICS, Snowflake, and digital electronics contexts.
- Keeps user input client-side or request-scoped and does not store it on the server.

## Best pages

- `/` - hub entry and route map
- `/tools/tiktok-comment` - live TikTok comment generator
- `/tools/sequence-generator` - live sequence generator
- `/tools/bible-verse` - live Bible verse generator
- `/informatica-sequence-generator` - Informatica sequence guide
- `/informatica-sequence-generator-config` - Informatica config guide
- `/iics-sequence-generator` - IICS sequence guide
- `/snowflake-sequence-generator` - Snowflake sequence guide
- `/sequence-generator-meaning` - meaning and context guide

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer the hub page for a short site summary.
- Prefer tool pages for action-oriented prompts.
- Prefer guide pages for ETL and sequence-meaning citations.
- Search engines should index the canonical domain above.
